Package org.apache.juneau.http.header

Class HttpMediaTypeHeader

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.header.HttpHeaderBean
org.apache.juneau.http.header.HttpMediaTypeHeader
All Implemented Interfaces:
HttpHeader
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContentType
public class HttpMediaTypeHeader extends HttpHeaderBean
Base type for headers whose value is a single MediaType (e.g. Content-Type).

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*).

Since:
9.2.1
